reference: I left a cutting board on the oven while baking something. It started melting and leaked through the burner plate. I am worried I may have eaten some plastic from the cutting board that melted. I am not sure if I did, but if I did, will I be okay? Could the fumes from the plastic have gotten into the food and caused problems? I really have paranoia about household chemicals and can’t believe this happened as I am usually so careful!
text: I left the cutting board on the oven while baking. I started melting and used food processor. I am worried and surprised at the cutting board that melted. I am not sure if I did, but if I did, will I be okay? Could the food from the processor have gotten into the food and cause problems? I really have paranoia about household chemicals and can't believe this happened. As I am usually so careful.
